item.title: SanDisk Memory Stick Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SanDisk Memory Stick Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
SanDisk Memory Stick Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Compact flash memory card files recovery tool rescue accidently deleted or damaged media files from all major brands of memory cards like Agfa, Apacer, Atech, ATP, AVB, Canon, Casio, Compaq, Corsair, Cyclone, Dycam, NEC Digimaster, EFilm, Edge, Epson, Ericsson, Everex, Fuji, Fujitsu, Hitachi, Hama, HP, IBM, Imation, Intel, IO Gear, JMTEK, JVC, Kingston, Kodak, Konica, Kyocera, Lexar, LG, Memorex, Microtech, Minolta, Mustek, Nikon, Olympus, Panasonic, Pentax, Philips, PNY and Polaroid. MMC mobile DV card files retrieval program retrieves BMP, PNG, GIF, CRW, CDRW, JPG, JPEG, TIFF, RAW, NEF, AVI, MOV, WAV, MPG, MPEG, mp3, mp4, m4a, m4v, m4b files from all types of corrupted memory sticks such as digital film card, DiskOnModule (DOM), FMM, Fire wire drives, iStick, memory stick Pro Duo, RS-MMC, MMC, PCMCIA, PC Card, Sandisk SD, secure digital card, MiniSD, Sony Magic Gate Duo, Transflash, microSD, xD Picture Card and Iomega Zip. M-card picture restoration utility restores lost images, snaps, audio, video songs, music, clips and movies from crashed multimedia card. Application provides the online data backup and fully compatible with windows including all version of Vista operating system. Application revives your data in case of system failure and software or hardware malfunctions.Features:* Recovers all types of media files from your corrupted or crashed memory cards.* Software has the attractive GUI facility that is helpful to understand and operate.* Supports all major brands of memory cards such as Sony, Samsung, Thosiba, Lexar, Siemens, Motorola and Nokia.* Rescue your inaccessible data when your device display an error message like drive is not formatted would you like to format it now?* Recoups picture, images, songs, music, word, text, doc, access, excel, PowerPoint and office files from your media device.

[read more]
item.description:
SanDisk Memory Stick Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Compact flash memory card files recovery tool rescue accidently deleted or damaged media files from all major brands of memory cards like Agfa, Apacer, Atech, ATP, AVB, Canon, Casio, Compaq, Corsair, Cyclone, Dycam, NEC Digimaster, EFilm, Edge, Epson, Ericsson, Everex, Fuji, Fujitsu, Hitachi, Hama, HP, IBM, Imation, Intel, IO Gear, JMTEK, JVC, Kingston, Kodak, Konica, Kyocera, Lexar, LG, Memorex, Microtech, Minolta, Mustek, Nikon, Olympus, Panasonic, Pentax, Philips, PNY and Polaroid. MMC mobile DV card files retrieval program retrieves BMP, PNG, GIF, CRW, CDRW, JPG, JPEG, TIFF, RAW, NEF, AVI, MOV, WAV, MPG, MPEG, mp3, mp4, m4a, m4v, m4b files from all types of corrupted memory sticks such as digital film card, DiskOnModule (DOM), FMM, Fire wire drives, iStick, memory stick Pro Duo, RS-MMC, MMC, PCMCIA, PC Card, Sandisk SD, secure digital card, MiniSD, Sony Magic Gate Duo, Transflash, microSD, xD Picture Card and Iomega Zip. M-card picture restoration utility restores lost images, snaps, audio, video songs, music, clips and movies from crashed multimedia card. Application provides the online data backup and fully compatible with windows including all version of Vista operating system. Application revives your data in case of system failure and software or hardware malfunctions.Features:* Recovers all types of media files from your corrupted or crashed memory cards.* Software has the attractive GUI facility that is helpful to understand and operate.* Supports all major brands of memory cards such as Sony, Samsung, Thosiba, Lexar, Siemens, Motorola and Nokia.* Rescue your inaccessible data when your device display an error message like drive is not formatted would you like to format it now?* Recoups picture, images, songs, music, word, text, doc, access, excel, PowerPoint and office files from your media device.

SanDisk Memory Stick Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Compact flash memory card files recovery tool rescue accidently deleted or damaged media files from all major brands of memory cards like Agfa, Apacer, Atech, ATP, AVB, Canon, Casio, Compaq, Corsair, Cyclone, Dycam, NEC Digimaster, EFilm, Edge, Epson, Ericsson, Everex, Fuji, Fujitsu, Hitachi, Hama, HP, IBM, Imation, Intel, IO Gear, JMTEK, JVC, Kingston, Kodak, Konica, Kyocera, Lexar, LG, Memorex, Microtech, Minolta, Mustek, Nikon, Olympus, Panasonic, Pentax, Philips, PNY and Polaroid. MMC mobile DV card files retrieval program retrieves BMP, PNG, GIF, CRW, CDRW, JPG, JPEG, TIFF, RAW, NEF, AVI, MOV, WAV, MPG, MPEG, mp3, mp4, m4a, m4v, m4b files from all types of corrupted memory sticks such as digital film card, DiskOnModule (DOM), FMM, Fire wire drives, iStick, memory stick Pro Duo, RS-MMC, MMC, PCMCIA, PC Card, Sandisk SD, secure digital card, MiniSD, Sony Magic Gate Duo, Transflash, microSD, xD Picture Card and Iomega Zip. M-card picture restoration utility restores lost images, snaps, audio, video songs, music, clips and movies from crashed multimedia card. Application provides the online data backup and fully compatible with windows including all version of Vista operating system. Application revives your data in case of system failure and software or hardware malfunctions.Features:* Recovers all types of media files from your corrupted or crashed memory cards.* Software has the attractive GUI facility that is helpful to understand and operate.* Supports all major brands of memory cards such as Sony, Samsung, Thosiba, Lexar, Siemens, Motorola and Nokia.* Rescue your inaccessible data when your device display an error message like drive is not formatted would you like to format it now?* Recoups picture, images, songs, music, word, text, doc, access, excel, PowerPoint and office files from your media device.

item.title: Cell Phones Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phones Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: pendriverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phones Recovery Application
(Utilities)
Recovery of data from formatted mobile phone can be easy if you choose Cell Phones Recovery Software from right website. Data Doctor Cell Phones Recovery Software plays a vital role in order to rescue your mistakenly lost digital photos, pictures, wallpapers, documents and other media files from virus infected mobile phones. Software performs recovery of data even drive not detected error message visible on PC screen.

[read more]

item.title: Data Recovery NTFS [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery NTFS [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery NTFS
(Utilities)
Reliable Data Recovery NTFS program quickly install on your laptop and easily download on www.datarecovery.or.in to retrieve your overall deleted, missing files information after accidental hard disk formatted and corrupted without any technical skills in few mouse clicks. Innovative restore PC program provides solution to recover overall NTFS files system corrupted, erased folders details after unexpected system shutdown in few minutes.

[read more]

item.title: Restore Deleted Mac Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Deleted Mac Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Deleted Mac Files
(Utilities)
Most widely used Mac digital picture recovery software is coming in market with extraordinary quality that allows user to take a complete backup of permanent corrupted memorable images, cute baby photo, marriage photographs, important files, mp3/mp4 songs, anniversary video, party clip etc and save them at safe location in desktop or at user specified another system. Resourceful Mac digital picture recovery application allows both technical and non-technical user to use such software without taking extra expertise training. Highly reliable Macintosh based digital camera lost photographs restoration utility is able to show a preview of recovered damaged files before actual regain of deleted data which saves time and money both in efficient manner. Restore deleted Mac files software allows user to save all recovers files, folders, audio, video, clip etc into different file format like Jpg, Jpeg, tiff, riff, gif, doc, txt, bitmap, mov etc in smooth way. Cost-effective image retrieval Mac program allows user to take a complete backup in case when data is lost due to different reasons such as human mistake, battery failure, improper handling of device, formatted/re-formatted memory card, software/hardware malfunction, virus/worms attack and many other same type of reasons. Amazing permanent corrupted Mac lost data recovery application supports restoration from different digital camera such as point and shoot camera, Digital video camera, Novelty camera, Speciality camera, Prosumer digital camera and many others. Features- * Safe and economical photo retrieval utility is used by different user to regain their damaged data in original form with high resolution. * Best and easy to operate Mac lost picture recovery software required minimum hard disk space to install software into personal computer. * Digital images restoration for Mac OS X supports all Macintosh based system like laptop, notebook, desktop, personal computer.

[read more]
item.description:
Restore Deleted Mac Files
(Utilities)
Most widely used Mac digital picture recovery software is coming in market with extraordinary quality that allows user to take a complete backup of permanent corrupted memorable images, cute baby photo, marriage photographs, important files, mp3/mp4 songs, anniversary video, party clip etc and save them at safe location in desktop or at user specified another system. Mobile Phone Pictures Recovery
(Utilities)
New Mobile Phone Pictures Recovery tool is available at trusted/reliable web site www.pendriverecovery.org to quickly find out damage, spoil, infected and corrupted files from mobile directory. Mobile phone data restoration software provide inbuilt cell phone scanning technology to search missing data and restore user define location. Mobile file salvage program is fully capable to get back your text documents from logically crashed cell phone.

item.title: FAT Volume Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FAT Volume Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
FAT Volume Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Windows FAT partition hard disk drive recovery software restores your deleted or corrupted master boot record mbr, partition table, file allocation table fat, dos boot record dbr of fat, fat32, fat16, fat12, vfat file system.The utility considered as disaster recovery tool for logically damaged root directory bad sectors. . FAT data recovery software is a data recovery utility recover retrieve restore corrupted lost erased files folders of fat for Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows7 operating system.Data recovery program ensures hard drive data recovery, low level formatting, information recovery, document restoration, hd and hdd recovery Download and recover all your doc, xls, jpg, jpeg, mp3, mpeg, tif, tiff, gif, bmp, rif, rtf documents. Features:* Support for FAT FAT12 FAT16 FAT32 VFAT file systems for Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows 7. * Ensures low level formatting and unerase missing corrupted deleted entries of mbr, dbr, fat table, root directory* Multi storage support( up to 128 storage media at a time ) for hard disk drive and storage media including IDE SATA EIDE and SCSI disk devices.* Recovers data lost due to improper shutdown, hardware malfunction, virus threats, power surges accidentally overwritten deleted formatted damaged or corrupted partitions in all logical crashes.* Support long File and Folders names and provide recovery of files after deletion from recycle bin(Shift+Del).* Supports all storage media like hdd thumb drive multimedia memory card iPod. * Unerase data of PC, laptop and desktop system partition volume.* Free evaluation download for corrupted volume disk crash. * Economical, safe and easy data recovery tool with user friendly graphical user interface GUI * Recovers data from bad crashed sectors affected in various storage media.

[read more]
item.description:
FAT Volume Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Windows FAT partition hard disk drive recovery software restores your deleted or corrupted master boot record mbr, partition table, file allocation table fat, dos boot record dbr of fat, fat32, fat16, fat12, vfat file system.The utility considered as disaster recovery tool for logically damaged root directory bad sectors. . FAT data recovery software is a data recovery utility recover retrieve restore corrupted lost erased files folders of fat for Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows7 operating system.Data recovery program ensures hard drive data recovery, low level formatting, information recovery, document restoration, hd and hdd recovery Download and recover all your doc, xls, jpg, jpeg, mp3, mpeg, tif, tiff, gif, bmp, rif, rtf documents. Features:* Support for FAT FAT12 FAT16 FAT32 VFAT file systems for Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows 7. * Ensures low level formatting and unerase missing corrupted deleted entries of mbr, dbr, fat table, root directory* Multi storage support( up to 128 storage media at a time ) for hard disk drive and storage media including IDE SATA EIDE and SCSI disk devices.* Recovers data lost due to improper shutdown, hardware malfunction, virus threats, power surges accidentally overwritten deleted formatted damaged or corrupted partitions in all logical crashes.* Support long File and Folders names and provide recovery of files after deletion from recycle bin(Shift+Del).* Supports all storage media like hdd thumb drive multimedia memory card iPod. * Unerase data of PC, laptop and desktop system partition volume.* Free evaluation download for corrupted volume disk crash. * Economical, safe and easy data recovery tool with user friendly graphical user interface GUI * Recovers data from bad crashed sectors affected in various storage media.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
FAT Volume Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Windows FAT partition hard disk drive recovery software restores your deleted or corrupted master boot record mbr, partition table, file allocation table fat, dos boot record dbr of fat, fat32, fat16, fat12, vfat file system.The utility considered as disaster recovery tool for logically damaged root directory bad sectors. . FAT data recovery software is a data recovery utility recover retrieve restore corrupted lost erased files folders of fat for Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows7 operating system.Data recovery program ensures hard drive data recovery, low level formatting, information recovery, document restoration, hd and hdd recovery Download and recover all your doc, xls, jpg, jpeg, mp3, mpeg, tif, tiff, gif, bmp, rif, rtf documents. Features:* Support for FAT FAT12 FAT16 FAT32 VFAT file systems for Windows 11, Windows 10, Windows 8, Windows 7. * Ensures low level formatting and unerase missing corrupted deleted entries of mbr, dbr, fat table, root directory* Multi storage support( up to 128 storage media at a time ) for hard disk drive and storage media including IDE SATA EIDE and SCSI disk devices.* Recovers data lost due to improper shutdown, hardware malfunction, virus threats, power surges accidentally overwritten deleted formatted damaged or corrupted partitions in all logical crashes.* Support long File and Folders names and provide recovery of files after deletion from recycle bin(Shift+Del).* Supports all storage media like hdd thumb drive multimedia memory card iPod. * Unerase data of PC, laptop and desktop system partition volume.* Free evaluation download for corrupted volume disk crash. * Economical, safe and easy data recovery tool with user friendly graphical user interface GUI * Recovers data from bad crashed sectors affected in various storage media.

[read more]

item.title: ToolsBaer MSG to Office 365 Importer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ToolsBaer MSG to Office 365 Importer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: michaelgeorge
item.itunes:summary:
ToolsBaer MSG to Office 365 Importer
(Utilities)
The useful ToolsBaer MSG to Office 365 Importer Application can easily move Outlook MSG files to the Office 365 email client. This Outlook MSG exporter assists in converting files along with all of the attachments and can transfer data several times without losing any sort of information. Throughout the conversion process, the tool helps in preserving data security. The following email attributes are exported by the program - (name, attachments, hyperlinks, CC, BCC, to, and from). With this version of the program, conversion accuracy is 100%. The product is safe to use for personal or professional uses. Utilize the program's free version to export 10 MSG files to Office 365. Any version of Microsoft Outlook, including versions 2003, 2007, 2010, 2013, 2016, 2019, and others, can simply import the converted MSG file. Microsoft Outlook doesn't need program installation. All versions of Windows, including 11, 10, 8, 8.1, 7, XP, and Vista, are compatible with the program. Install the free trial version to get started right away.
Read More: - http://www.toolsbaer.com/msg-to-office-365-importer/
[read more]

item.title: How to Retrieve Deleted Files on a Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: How to Retrieve Deleted Files on a Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
How to Retrieve Deleted Files on a Mac
(Utilities)
If you erased files on your memory card and panic for how to retrieve deleted files on a mac? MAC memory card data undelete utility is best choice to retrieve all accidentally deleted project files, text files, RAW images, photos etc from corrupted secure digital card in few easy and countable steps. Advance featured MAC memory card data retrieval application facilitate user to efficiently and effectively recover all personal collection and business crucial documents from virus infected multimedia card in fraction of time. Comprehensive solution is provided by MAC card data restoration program to get answer for how to retrieve deleted files on a mac at reasonable price. Demo version of freeware MAC card data restoration program offers easy-to-use platform to recover all type of files regardless of their extensions from malfunctioning software of memory card in most simplified manner. How to retrieve deleted files on a mac! use most advance and easy to use MAC memory card data retrieval application that get back all corrupted music files of various formats including Mp3, Mp4, MPEG, M4V, M4P, MTS, M4B, WAV, M4A, 3GP, MP4A etc from MMC card of iPods or portable mp3 music player. Essential Features: *Advance featured MAC secure digital card data recovery software facilitates user to retrieve all important and precious files lost after ejecting memory card from storage device or card reader during transfer to PC. * Powerful MAC SD data undelete utility easily retrieve all media or text files from memory card that lost due to suddenly power failure during copying them to Apple computer. * Efficient MAC data rescue utility retrieve all inaccessible files and folders when errors like "drive not formatted" displayed while connecting memory card to the computer. * Award winning MAC memory card recovery software uses deep scanning mechanism to detect and recover text documents and office files from MMC card with full data integrity.

[read more]

How to Retrieve Deleted Files on a Mac
(Utilities)

item.title: Vista Partition Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Vista Partition Data Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Vista Partition Data Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Vista partition data recovery software recover corrupted, deleted or lost data from FAT and NTFS partitions. Hard disk partition recovery utility quickly and easily recovers deleted files emptied from the Windows Recycle Bin, or lost due to formatted or corrupted hard drive, virus or Trojan infection and unexpected system shutdown or Software failure. Data backup tool recover encrypted and compressed files from previously existing partition.

[read more]
item.description:
